title: I Am a Fugitive from a Chain Gang
writer: Robert E. Burns, Howard J. Green, Brown Holmes
actors: Paul Muni, Glenda Farrell, Helen Vinson
plot: A World War I veteran and aspiring engineer tries to re-enter civilian life. After being unwillingly caught up in a robbery, he suffers the intolerable conditions of a Southern chain gang, struggling to clear his name and prove hi...
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 6 wins & 3 nominations total
